full_text:
Wei Dan (Zhongjiang)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Dan, styledZhongjiang, was born in Jingzhao. One of the finest calligraphers of his time, took part in creating the Huang lan. Wei Dan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
